author: qndel
orig: po 2 tyg pytam jak tam moje zamówienie, "aaa o chuj, nie ma i nie będzie"
en: after 2 weeks I ask how my order is going, "oh shit, it's gone and it won't be"
pt: depois de 2 semanas eu pergunto como está meu pedido, "ah, merda, acabou e não vai mais"
label: offensive

context.author: qndel
context.orig: ostatnio mnie brw na materac ojebało
context.en: I've been mad about the mattress lately
context.pt: Estou bravo com o colchão ultimamente

context.author: qndel
context.orig: mieli na stronce promkę 900 -> 200, limitowana ilość, kupiłem
context.en: They had a promotion of 900 -> 200 on their website, limited quantity, I bought it
context.pt: Tinham promoção de 900 -> 200 no site deles, quantidade limitada, comprei

context.author: lepryko
context.en: I had to pay 11k compensation XD
context.pt: Tive que pagar uma indenização de 11k XD
context.label: clean

context.author: qndel
context.orig: "przestali produkować, nie mamy na magazynie, wykurwiaj"
context.en: "they stopped producing, we don't have it in stock, fuck off"
context.pt: "pararam de produzir, não temos em estoque, vai se foder"
context.label: xenophobic

context.author: qndel
context.orig: strona bezczelnie pokazuje że mają na magazynie 😄
context.en: the website brazenly shows that they have them in stock 😄
context.pt: o site mostra descaradamente que os tem em estoque 😄
context.label: clean
